description: These slip-ons from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear. The simple design is complemented with colourful straps and is perfect when teamed with casuals.UpperT-strap with colourful leather straps covering the midfoot for a snug Fit and great eye appealSoft lining for added styleTextured footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for added comfortThis product may also come without the design on the outsoleSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
